hero.subtitle: Greenspace E-Mobility is the reference in charging solutions and e-mobility for the region. We drive the transition to cleaner, more sustainable transportation.

solutions.title: Everything you need to electrify your mobility
solutions.subtitle: From residential charging to high-power public infrastructure, we have the perfect solution for every need.

residential.title: Residential Charging
residential.desc: Smart home chargers with Wi-Fi connectivity, energy management and solar panel compatibility.

commercial.title: Commercial Charging
commercial.desc: Solutions for businesses, fleets and parking lots with centralized management and integrated billing.

public.title: Public DC Charging
public.desc: High-power chargers (50–350 kW) for public access, routes and mobility hubs.

fleet.title: Fleet Management
fleet.desc: Software and hardware to optimize electric fleet charging, reducing operational costs.

solar.title: Solar Integration
solar.desc: We combine photovoltaic energy with charging systems to maximize savings and sustainability.

software.title: Digital Platform
software.desc: App and web portal for real-time monitoring, consumption reports and remote charger management.

highway.title: The most ambitious charging network in the region
highway.subtitle: A continuous charging corridor connecting cities, boosting electric tourism and democratizing sustainable mobility.
highway.feature1Desc: Stations every 100 km on main routes, ensuring no trip runs out of energy.
highway.feature2Desc: DC technology up to 150 kW. From 0 to 80% in less than 30 minutes.
highway.feature3Desc: Dynamic energy management, renewable energy integration and frictionless payments.
highway.feature4Desc: Spaces designed for rest, commerce and services, turning charging into an experience.

hub.title: Next-generation E-Mobility Centers
hub.subtitle: Electric Hubs are strategic points where fast charging meets services, data and the EV community.

partners.title: Technology from the world's best manufacturers
partners.subtitle: We work with leading e-mobility brands to guarantee world-class quality, warranty and technical support.

whyUs.title: The expertise your project needs
whyUs.reason1Desc: We know the context, regulations and needs of the Latin American market better than anyone.
whyUs.reason2Desc: From initial consulting to installation, maintenance and 24/7 technical support.
whyUs.reason3Desc: We only work with certified manufacturers and globally proven technology.
whyUs.reason4Desc: Every project we execute directly contributes to emissions reduction in the region.

cta.title: Ready to electrify your mobility?
cta.subtitle: Let's talk. Our team of experts will design the perfect solution for your home, business or project.

about.title: Pioneers of e-mobility in the region
about.p1: Greenspace E-Mobility was born with a clear mission: to accelerate the transition to electric mobility in Latin America. Since our beginnings, we have combined cutting-edge technology with deep knowledge of the regional market.
about.p2: We are authorized distributors of the world's most recognized brands in electric vehicle charging, offering a comprehensive service from initial consulting to continuous infrastructure operation.
about.p3: Our vision is a continent where mobility is 100% electric, accessible and powered by renewable energy. Every charger we install is a step toward that future.
about.missionText: To democratize electric mobility in Latin America, making charging as easy, fast and affordable as traditional fueling.
about.visionText: To be the largest and most reliable e-mobility network in Latin America by 2030.

products.title: Charging solutions for every application
products.subtitle: Certified chargers from the best brands, with warranty, professional installation and technical support.
products.wallboxDesc: The most awarded brand in smart charging for home and business.

pulsar.name: Pulsar Plus
pulsar.desc: The most compact and powerful residential charger. 7.4 kW, Wi-Fi connectivity, app control.

commander2.name: Commander 2
commander2.desc: Commercial charger with touchscreen, RFID and advanced energy management. Ideal for offices and parking lots.

hypernova.name: Hypernova
hypernova.desc: Wallbox's ultra-fast DC charger. Up to 400 kW, recharge in minutes.

neo.name: Neo
neo.desc: Premium design home charger with integrated smart energy management.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: Complete the form and one of our experts will contact you within 24 hours.
contact.successText: Thank you for contacting us. We will reply within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: The e-mobility reference in the region.
